response.overview: Emad, a 10-year-old boy, loves ice cream despite his father's strict ban. Forced to eat it in secret to avoid punishment, he imagines his father has eyes everywhere watching him. One day, noticing his father is unwell, Emad chooses to ignore the tension and finally eats his ice cream in front of him with a sense of liberated joy.
response.title: بابا قالي
